headlines.title: Republicans brace for money problems in Texas after Ken Paxton’s win
headlines.description: Ken Paxton has trailed Democratic state Rep. James Talarico in fundraising. Some Republicans say the party will have to spend millions to win the Senate race.

headlines.title: Former CIA officer accused of stealing 300 gold bars worth $40 million
headlines.description: A former CIA senior officer with top secret-level clearance is accused of stealing 300 gold bars that he said he needed for “work-related expenses,” sources say.

headlines.title: Today: Laura Jarrett answers your questions about the Supreme Court and more
headlines.description: Today is a decision day at the Supreme Court, which has yet to issue rulings on consequential cases like Trump v. Barbara on birthright citizenship or Trump v. Lisa Cook, the Federal Reserve official.

headlines.title: Iran and U.S. exchange new strikes, after Trump dismisses pressure to end war
headlines.description: Iran said Thursday that it had targeted a U.S. air base in response to new U.S. military attacks in the south of the country, raising new doubts about a deal to end the war and reopen the crucial Strait of Hormuz

headlines.title: U.S. military launches new strikes on Iranian drones
headlines.description: The U.S. military shot down multiple incoming drones and struck one ground control station inside Iran, according to a U.S. official. NBC News’ Gabe Gutierrez reports.

headlines.title: Jill Biden says she thought her husband was 'having a stroke' during 2024 debate
headlines.description: Former first lady Jill Biden says she thought her husband was "having a stroke" during the 2024 debate against President Trump. "It scared me to death,” Jill Biden said in an interview with CBS News’ “Sunday Morning.”

headlines.title: Trump backs federal regulation of prediction markets as states seek to place restrictions
headlines.description: President Trump says he wants the federal government to set the "rules of the road" on prediction markets. But fears about insider trading and his family's ties to the platforms have caused some states to push back. NBC News' Brian Cheung reports.

headlines.title: Vance calls Pope Leo’s AI warnings ‘profound’
headlines.description: Vance said in an interview with NBC News he is glad the pope tackled AI. He also discussed why X remains off his phone after he deleted it for Lent.

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: Jill Biden says she thought Joe Biden was ‘having a stroke’ during 2024 debate
headlines.description: Former first lady Jill Biden said in an interview clip released Wednesday that she thought her husband, former President Joe Biden, was “having a stroke” during his critical June 2024 debate, which catalyzed the chain of events that eventually led him to drop out of the presidential election.“I don’t know what happened.

headlines.title: Trump’s May primary scorecard: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: In today’s edition, we take stock of President Donald Trump’s retribution campaign this month as Ken Paxton and James Talarico look ahead to the general election in Texas.

headlines.title: Proposed bill would tax New Yorkers who tap ‘anti-weaponization’ fund at 100%
headlines.description: A New York lawmaker says state residents who tap the Trump administration’s controversial $1.8 billion “anti-weaponization” fund should be required to pay a 100% state income tax on the money.
